name: @verric/desktop
description: Tauri desktop wrapper around the Verric studio. Cross-OS installers for Windows / macOS / Linux.

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('@verric/desktop: skipping native bundle (requires Rust + tauri-cli). Run \\`pnpm --filter @verric/desktop tauri:build\\` from a host with cargo to ship platform installers.')"
